name: Pre-existing distrust of lawyers, now AI hallucination in Houston—how's this different?
description: AI verification failure is key negligence proof.[2]

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing distrust of lawyers, now AI hallucination in Houston—how's this different?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI verification failure is key negligence proof.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: AI adds specific negligence layer: failure to verify hallucinations, distinct from general distrust, actionable per sanctions precedents.[2] Factors: tie harm to AI error. Prove deviation from care standard. Stronger case with tech evidence.
